title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build an agentic AI application using Claude Code across three interfaces: desktop app, terminal, and VS Code integration. The example project is a Resume and Cover Letter Generator with personalization and skill suggestion features. Covers installation, API key setup, Node.js configuration, and local deployment.
